prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约11338→12590→12333→21597→10823，2024年因考试模式切换（理科→物理类）及批次合并（本科一批→本科批）出现位次大幅后 移至21597，2025年迅速回弹至10823，近两年波动剧烈；2025年基准约10823名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年16人、2022年17人、2023年15人、2024年11人、20 25年10人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划大幅扩至22人，较2025年扩招120%，竞争压力理论上明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约 第48名，近年排名稳定在44–53区间，属全国师范类院校第二梯队头部；2026年声誉评价偏正面，主要源于硕士报考热度高（拟招3100人、预估报考1.5万人）， 反映教育学领域高人气；抖音热度排名第67、评价一般，短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；马克思主义理论A+、教育学A+、世界史A+、统计学A、生 态学A-、生物学A-，共6个A-及以上学科，师范类学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度2024年评估为分化观望，较2023年小幅降温；计算机类、电子信息等工科专业热度持续偏高；本省2026年普通高考总人数约299000，较2025年（历史类+物理类合计约297258）略有增加，竞争小 幅加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批387分，较2024年380分略升，难度基本稳定；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，距贵州省较远，跨省报考存在地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10823、2026年大幅扩招120%至22人（位次后移主因）、本省考生总数略增、声誉偏正面及 专业吸引力增强等因素；考虑到扩招幅度虽大但新增专业（化学、计算机类等）吸引力较强，且考生总数增加、声誉正面，实际竞争略高 于纯扩招预期，在基准位次基础上小幅回调约200名。预测2026年物理类最低位次约18416名，区间17916–18916名。

- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能等）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 11338 → 12590 → 12333 → 21597 → 10823. In 2024, due to the exam mode switch (Science → Physics Category) and batch merger (First Batch → Undergraduate Batch), the ranking dropped significantly to 21597, but rebounded sharply to 10823 in 2025, showing drastic fluctuations in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is about 10823. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 16 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 10 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction trend. In 2026, the plan expands significantly to 22, a 120% increase from 2025, theoretically easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 48th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings between 44–53 in recent years, belonging to the second-tier top of national normal universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, mainly due to high popularity in master's degree applications (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated 15000 applicants), reflecting high interest in education. Douyin popularity ranking is 67th, with average evaluation and moderate short video exposure. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Disciplines include Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, Biology A-, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above, highlighting strong normal university disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of normal/education majors in 2024 is assessed as divergent and wait-and-see, slightly cooling compared to 2023. Popularity of engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information remains high. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 299000, slightly increased from 2025 (History Category + Physics Category total about 297258), leading to a slight intensification of competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 387 points, slightly up from 380 in 2024, indicating basically stable difficulty. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, far from Guizhou Province, so cross-provincial applications are influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 10823, the 120% enrollment expansion to 22 in 2026 (main reason for ranking decline), a slight increase in provincial examinee numbers, positive reputation, and enhanced major attractiveness; considering that although the expansion is large, the new majors (Chemistry, Computer Science, etc.) are highly attractive, and with increased examinee numbers and positive reputation, actual competition is slightly higher than pure expansion expectations, with a small adjustment of about 200 places upward from the baseline ranking. Predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking is approximately 18416, with a range of 17916–18916.

Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Chemistry (Normal)
- Physics (Physics (Normal), Electronic Information Science and Technology, Materials Physics)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science (Normal), Biotechnology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering, Ecology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category sees significant enrollment expansion, with predicted ranking range 17916–18916. Candidates within this range should prioritize Tier 2 majors as main choices, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 17000) can focus on popular majors like Mathematics and Computer Science.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1510 → 1621 → 1346 → 2447 → 2344. In 2024, due to the exam mode switch (liberal arts → history category) and batch merger (first batch → undergraduate batch), the ranking shifted back to 2447, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 2344; overall, it has shifted back by about 800 places in the past two years, with a baseline of approximately 2344 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 7 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 7 in 2025, showing significant fluctuation. In 2026, the plan increases to 11, an expansion of about 57% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 48th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top tier of the second echelon of national normal universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with high popularity for master's degree applications; Douyin popularity ranking is 67th, with average reviews; no record of enrollment gaps; Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, highly matching with history category enrollment majors (Marxist Theory, Political Science), with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of normal/education majors is divided and wait-and-see; Marxist Theory, Political Science and other liberal arts majors have stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is approximately 299,000, slightly higher than 2025. The provincial control line for history category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 458 points, up from 442 points in 2024, indicating a slight increase in difficulty. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, far from Guizhou Province, with cross-provincial application influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2344, the 57% expansion to 11 places in 2026 (main reason for ranking shift back), a slight increase in the total number of exam takers in the province, a relatively positive reputation, and the appeal of advantageous disciplines; considering that the expansion is significant but the new majors (English, Political Science and Administration) have moderate appeal, and the increase in exam takers and slight rise in the provincial control line, actual competition is slightly higher than expected from pure expansion, with a small adjustment of about 50 places upward from the baseline ranking. The predicted minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 is approximately 3098, with a range of 2633–3563.

It is recommended that candidates within this range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
